## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe clearly.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be specific about contract interfaces, storage changes, or workflow modifications.

## Alternative Solutions

Describe alternatives you've considered.

## Impact

Which contracts would this affect?

- [ ] credit_token
- [ ] credit_factory
- [ ] verification_oracle
- [ ] retirement_registry
- [ ] project_registry
- [ ] governance
- [ ] tests
- [ ] scripts
- [ ] documentation

## Additional Context

- References to similar features in other protocols
- Links to relevant discussions or specs
- Any research or prior art
